title: Merit badge (canonical entity file)
description: One file per merit badge ever offered: data/merit-badges/<slug>.json. Discontinued badges keep their file (identity is permanent); retirement is a 'discontinued' event and a closed final version window. Replacement chains (e.g. computers -> digital-technology) are 'superseded' events in data/merit-badges/_events.json. Requirement content lives in separate requirement-set documents, not here. 'Active vs retired' status is derivable (null-valid_to version exists?) and will be materialized by the published projection.

versions.description: Chronologically ordered, non-overlapping snapshots (pipeline-enforced). A new version window is opened by renames AND by eagle_required flips (e.g. Citizenship in Society becoming Eagle-required 2022-07).

name.description: Official badge name during this window.

eagle_required.description: Whether the badge was Eagle-required (including as a listed alternative) during this window. Denormalized convenience — the purist source of truth is the Eagle rank requirement set of the era.

tags.description: Open vocabulary for grouping (e.g. stem, citizenship, outdoor).

description.description: Short original-prose description. Never verbatim pamphlet text.
